MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Plaintiff JOSEPH NORTHINGTON, Tel No. 415-575-3728 appearing in pro per;
No other appearances made in this matter.

The Court finds Plaintiff did not notify the opposing side of his intent to appear today. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT DANIEL ZEROM'S Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint is granted. No opposition filed. Prevailing party to prepare and submit a proposed order to the Court for signature.
